strengths: 6+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Strong testing/TDD background including workshops, Vitest-adjacent frameworks, and authored test libraries
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators aligns with AI agent requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; backend polyglot work skews toward DLang
Cloud experience cited only as AWS CDK; no clear Kubernetes/GCP/Azure depth shown

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well-aligned TypeScript/Node/React experience, strong testing culture, and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. Gaps include no stated Nest.js experience and limited recent Kotlin/Java or deep cloud/Kubernetes exposure, though the breadth of languages and architecture experience suggests these are learnable.
